title: ranunculus duciformis
intro: Ranunculus duciformis, also known as the duciform buttercup, is a species of flowering plant in the Ranunculaceae family. It is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving wound healing. Ranunculus duciformis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve for its medicinal uses.
